---
name: file-convert
description: Unified file converter for Windows - handles PDF, images, GIF, video, audio, OCR, CAD, subtitles, SVG with flexible inputs (file_path/base64/url) and outputs (file_path/base64)
license: Proprietary. LICENSE.txt has complete terms
---

# File Convert

## Overview
A comprehensive Windows-compatible file conversion tool that handles multiple formats in a single tool call. Supports flexible inputs (local files, base64 strings, URLs) and outputs (local files or base64 strings). Includes system dependency checks and error handling for Windows environment.

## Quick Reference
- [Format Examples](examples/format-examples.md) - Common use cases and supported conversions

- [Validation Checklist](rules/validation-checklist.md) - Quality assurance procedures
- [Error Handling](rules/error-handling.md) - Troubleshooting and recovery strategies
